news.summary:

news.headline: 'Both sides are committed' to US-EU trade deal, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer says
news.summary: In an interview with FRANCE 24, US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer insisted that despite fresh US tariffs proposed this Wednesday, "both sides are committed to compliance" with the US-EU trade deal.
